name: Scandium Canada Ltd.
description: Scandium Canada Ltd. is a technology metals company focused on the development and commercialization of scandium resources. The company is currently advancing its flagship Crater Lake project in Nunavik, Quebec, which aims to become North America’s largest primary source of scandium. By producing high-performance aluminum-scandium alloys and powders, the company supports critical innovations in high-tech sectors such as aerospace, automotive, and additive manufacturing. Scandium Canada is committed to contributing to global carbon emission reduction efforts while maintaining strong relationships with local and First Nations communities in a respected mining jurisdiction.
